title: How a Man of God Becomes the Same Guy in Every Room
caption:
Every guy has a few versions of himself running at once. Church guy, gym guy, the guy from the group chat at midnight.

Scripture never asked you to be impressive in every room. It asked you to be the same one.

Let what you say be simply yes or no. (Matthew 5:37)

Here's what it actually costs to close the gap.

#faith #christianmen #integrity #godlymen #manofgod #scripture
